title: FartPlugin
description: Every time you crouch, you fart.
body: [https://youtu.be/7rs1rdYZbGo](https://youtu.be/7rs1rdYZbGo) Every time you crouch, you fart. When you're in water it makes a different sound. It makes green particles when you fart and you can turn on command-only if you want it to only work when you do /fart, you can change that in the config- "plugins/FartPlugin/config.yml". fart-flying flings you upwards when you fart, turn it on in "plugins/FartPlugin/config.yml" You can do /fart [playername] to troll your friends. It automatically downloads my texture pack since it was the only way to add custom sounds.
